title: Create +++
description: Create modpack, where all adventure begins.
body:
### 💡 This modpack is based on **Create**, but it has a lot of main add-ons to it, such as :
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
> 1. **🚀Ad Astra** - Has 6 planets to choose, but you need rockets to travel to them.
> 2. **🌌Origins** - You can choose you origin, which has buffs, and debuffs to it.
> 3. **🎯Pufferfish Skills** - Allows getting points from killing and mining, which you can spend on different buffs.
> 4. **📜FTB Quests** - It has A LOT of types of quests, but its main is Create and Ad Astra.
> 5. **⛰️YUNG's addons** - So you can feel the realism of your world.
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
![(Modpack display)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb0bbff1bafdb3c304685035d38d60190bee7396.jpeg)

_**🌌Here, you can go beyond the Create, and think of much bigger projects, where a lot of structures, dungeons and worlds are surround your playtime.🌌**_

**🗺️What are you waiting for? Try it yourself to find out your real and unforgivable adventure!🗺️**
